articles.title: OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 model is more efficient and better at coding
articles.summary: OpenAI just announced its new GPT-5.5 model, which the company calls its "smartest and most intuitive to use model yet, and the next step toward a new way of getting work done on a computer." OpenAI just released GPT-5.4 last month, but says that the new GPT-5.5 "excels" at tasks like writing and debugging code, […]

articles.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
articles.summary: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

articles.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
articles.summary: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

articles.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
articles.summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

articles.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
articles.summary: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.
